title: rubus lamprophyllus
intro: Rubus lamprophyllus, also known as the glossy blackberry, is a species of bramble native to eastern Asia. The plant is known for its edible fruits and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lamprophyllus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of Rubus lamprophyllus are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or by using them in tinctures and teas.
